title: Kenji's & Jerzyk's Better Shinies
description: A small resourcepack by Kenji_64 & Jerzykv, that improves the look on a few fan favorite Pokémon with disliked shiny forms in Cobblemon
body:
### Hello everyone! It's me again, Kenji!
While you're probably waiting for Cobblemon 1.6 and Stellar Blue 1.2 to release, I have prepared something that will make your waiting time a bit more interesting...

**Introducing this little resourcepack I created, that revives a few commonly disliked shinies.**
Why are they disliked? They are TOO SUBTLE! And I'm here to change that!
Popularly hated shinies like Gengar and Garchomp get a completely new look, while shinies, that almost don't change at all get to shine in their true colors like the now silver Gholdengo or blue Armarouge. Exciting!

Without further ado: Enjoy my take on these shiny Pokémon and see you all in Cobblemon 1.6!

![The new shiny Tinkaton!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2eacfba9b93826fef9ad991c3030dc838f520181.png)
